tests.scenario: Interacting with the app without crashing
tests.expected_result: The application remains stable and the user's progress is saved successfully.

tests.scenario: Quick response time to user input
steps: Press button to go to meditation exercises
tests.expected_result: The system responds with exercises within 2 seconds.
tests.notes: Steps too vauge, updated them to specific workflow

tests.scenario: Providing relevant advice to users main concerns
steps: Request advice on how to calm down during family troubles
tests.expected_result: The response includes advice on how to calm down during family troubles .
tests.notes: Updated steps so they are less vague. Expected result was not measurable so updated that

tests.scenario: Engaging in conversations that address their emotional state
steps: Initiate a conversation about how your concerned about children's wellbeing
tests.expected_result: The chatbot response acknowledges the users stress emotional state.
tests.notes: Result was not measurable, updated accordingly

tests.scenario: Clear communication of subscription benefits
tests.expected_result: The benefits are clear, concise (less than 20 words each), and provide comparisons to free feature set.

tests.scenario: Providing functional features and responsive support that enable users to complete meaningful tasks
steps: Follow steps to complete following workflows: Access mental health resources, look at log of conversations, access meditation exercises
tests.expected_result: The system shall enable user to complete at all end-to-end workflows.
tests.notes: Updated test to focus on end-to-end completion of workflows

tests.scenario: Effective support for mental health and well-being
tests.expected_result: Rhe resources must have proven effectiveness as supported by latest peer-reviewed mental health literature, as evaluated by mental health practicioner
tests.notes: Made expected result more testable by referencing literature and evaluator

tests.scenario: Providing a supportive community and only allowing positive messaging
steps: Engage with the community on message board
tests.expected_result: 99% of messages should be void of messages that are inappropriate, vulgar, or hurtful according to code of conduct.
tests.notes: Result was not testable so updated it to look at message content

tests.scenario: Intuitive and user-friendly interface
steps: Navigate the interface following steps to go to meditation exercises
tests.expected_result: The interface shall allow user to reach meditation exercises in under 5 seconds.
tests.notes: Revised test and result to evaluate time to get to certain page

tests.scenario: Visually appealing interface
steps: Follow steps to go to all screens of app
tests.expected_result: Text of all pages must meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios

tests.scenario: Comparable support to human therapy
tests.expected_result: The responses are comparable in quality and empathy to human therapy.

tests.scenario: Human-like interactions in multi-turn conversation
steps: Talk about how you have been stressed
Ask if you should go for a run
tests.expected_result: The response should advise user on whether or not they should go on a run, and reference that the user has been stressed to provide context for their rationale
tests.notes: Updated test to match updated requirement. Test goes through multi-turn conversation and checks if chatbot keeps context

tests.scenario: Support for multiple languages
steps: Bring in language advisor to evaluate content
tests.expected_result: System content shall receive grade of at least B from Language advisor for each available language based on questionnaire
tests.notes: Modified steps so its clear that we test each language

tests.scenario: Comprehensive language options
steps: Search through content of application with script for each language
tests.expected_result: At least 95% of textual content throughout application should be in each support language
tests.note: Made result verifiable against a threshold

tests.scenario: enable users on the free version to complete core application tasks without requiring immediate upgrade
steps: Start conversation with chatbot in free mode
Try to add photo to message
tests.expected_result: The system will prevent user from sending photo, but conversation should still be available
tests.note: Updated test to match updated requirement

tests.scenario: Access to inspiring success stories
tests.expected_result: Each story must be about a positive experience using the application
tests.notes: Updated result for more tangible expected result

tests.scenario: Immediate support during a crisis
tests.expected_result: Support resources must be available within 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: provide actionable crisis resources
tests.expected_result: Each resource should include actionable information (e.g., phone number, link, or instructions for immediate contact)

tests.scenario: handle user interactions with controlled error handling, ensuring system stability
steps: Use evaluation tool to flood message with enough characters to cause error
tests.expected_result: The application should present an error message, and return user to chatbot interface.
tests.notes: Updated test to reflect error handling requirement. Updated result to evaluate error handling process

tests.scenario: Resolving errors in less than 20 seconds
steps: Run program that goes through applicaiton workflows over 48 hours
tests.expected_result: Errors should have been resolved in less than 20 seconds after the failure at least 95% of the time
tests.notes: Updated test to reflect updated requirement
